message:
fix(model,search): add closed_at validation and eliminate search double-computation

model.rs: Add validation that closed_at cannot be earlier than
created_at, matching the existing updated_at check. Previously an issue
could have an impossible closed_at < created_at without validation
catching it. Add 2 regression tests.

search.rs: Merge the two match-on-mode blocks in execute_search() into
one, eliminating duplicate computation of pagerank, status, impact,
priority, and recency values in hybrid mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
